title: Marketplace Manager - Delhivery Ventures Solutions - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Delhivery Ventures Solutions - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Join the Delhivery Ventures Solutions family as a Marketplace Manager in Agra. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Delhivery Ventures Solutions:
Delhivery Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Content Writing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Delhivery Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
